name: Fulcrum Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Fulcrum Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing small molecules to improve the lives of patients with genetically defined rare diseases in areas of high unmet medical need. Our lead product candidate, pociredir, is in clinical development for the potential treatment of SCD.

exposures.sentence: Our lead product candidate, pociredir, is in clinical development for the potential treatment of SCD.

catalysts.event: Provide details regarding the design of the next trial
catalysts.sentence: We plan to provide details regarding the design of the next trial in the second quarter of 2026 following receipt of meeting minutes from our End-of-Phase meeting with the FDA.
Pending feedback from the FDA, we plan to initiate a potential registration-enabling trial in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Engage with EMA for protocol assistance
catalysts.sentence: We also plan to engage with the EMA in mid-2026 to obtain protocol assistance and feedback on the design of the next trial.
